text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is right<n>around the corner!
King is planning to<n>run too, but lately she's been
on a<n>losing streak...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She challenges me to a scrimmage,<n>even though
she's already tired after<n>running in a race today. I
end up<n>winning pretty soundly, but King's not
ready to give up!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She shows me that her charm is<n>rooted in her
unflagging tenacity!<n>Realizing that, I see that there
was<n>never any reason for me to worry<n>about her!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In fact, she's a goddess in the flesh!<n>I'm gonna
do my best in the Mile<n>Championship so I can do
her proud!
